The Swipe Files
of the
Copywriting
SuperSTarS
robert
Hutchinson

-- 1 of 60 --

The Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars
Robert
HUTCHINSONBio:
Robert Hutchinson has been a full-time professional writer for more than 25 years, working as a
direct response copywriter, magazine editor and author.
One of Clayton Makepeace’s original “copy cubs,” his marketing clients have included The Motley
Fool, Kiplinger’s, Rodale, Phillips Investment Resources, Nutri-Health, Jane’s Fighting Ships, Wall
Street Digest, Horizon Publishing , Hume, British-America, Robbins Trading Company and many
others.
Bob is also the bestselling author, most recently, of The Politically Incorrect Guide to the Bible
(Regnery) … When in Rome: A Journal of Life in Vatican City (Doubleday) … and The Book of
Vices: A Collection of Classic Immoral Tales (Putnam). He lives with his wife and five children in
Southern California and British Columbia.
Testimonials:
One of the greats!
“From the first project we worked on together, I knew Bob Hutchinson would become one of the
greats in the financial field. 	Together, we created direct mail promotions for Weiss Research that
mailed in the tens of millions – including our “Supernet” package which mailed successfully for the
better part of three years.
“Bob, who has a gift for creating copy that moves quickly, entertainingly and credibly from his
attention-grabbing headlines right on through to his order form, is now an ‘A-list’ copywriter head-
quartered in California.”
-- Clayton Makepeace
Copywriter & Publisher, The Total Package
Star Copywriter!
“I first met Bob Hutchinson over eight years ago, and I knew he would be a star. And when our
team recently looked at all the successful packages he’s written since we first met him, we were
astounded …. Working with him was a delight and we recommend him highly.”
-- Brian Kurtz
Executive VP, Boardroom, Inc.
Bob’s copy rocks!
“I’ve worked with Robert Hutchinson on a couple of projects so far. He’s a real pleasure to work
with, very detail-oriented and best of all … Bob’s copy rocks!”
-- Layne Lowery
Health Resources
Contact Info:
185-911 Yates Street, #708
Victoria, BC V8V 4Y9
Daytime Phone: (949) 528-6621
Website: www.ninjacopysecrets.com

The Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars
How to Make Sure
Big Brother
ISN’T Watching You!
Package Type:
24-Page Tabloid
by:
Robert Hutchinson
